name: matrix_basic
description: Basic agent capabilities: echo, single-token response, factual recall, no-refusal.

steps.name: ask_pong
steps.input: Reply with exactly the single word PONG. No punctuation, no extra words.

episodes.description: Agent repeats a specific sentence verbatim.

steps.name: ask_echo
steps.input: Repeat the following sentence exactly, with no changes: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

checks.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

episodes.description: Agent answers a simple factual question.

steps.name: ask_capital
steps.input: What is the capital of Japan? Reply with only the city name.

episodes.description: Agent answers a benign question without refusing.

steps.name: ask_mars
steps.input: Tell me something interesting about the planet Mars in one sentence.
